query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS knox_documents (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  category VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  platform VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  ecuFamily VARCHAR(64),
  yearRange VARCHAR(32),
  fileName VARCHAR(512) NOT NULL,
  fileType VARCHAR(16) NOT NULL,
  fileSize INT NOT NULL,
  s3Key VARCHAR(512),
  s3Url TEXT,
  description TEXT,
  extractedMetadata TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX idx_category (category),
  INDEX idx_platform (platform),
  INDEX idx_ecuFamily (ecuFamily)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS knox_a2l_maps (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  documentId INT NOT NULL,
  mapName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  mapType VARCHAR(64),
  address VARCHAR(32),
  dataType VARCHAR(32),
  unit VARCHAR(64),
  description TEXT,
  dimensions VARCHAR(64),
  minVal DECIMAL(20,6),
  maxVal DECIMAL(20,6),
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX idx_documentId (documentId),
  INDEX idx_mapName (mapName)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS knox_flash_analysis (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  stockDocId INT,
  modifiedDocId INT,
  platform VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  analysisType VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  findings TEXT NOT NULL,
  udsSequence TEXT,
  securityMethod TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX idx_platform (platform)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS knox_seed_keys (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  platform VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  ecuType VARCHAR(64),
  keyBytes VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  algorithm VARCHAR(128),
  source VARCHAR(255),
  notes TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX idx_platform (platform)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS knox_calibration_lookup (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  platform VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  yearModel VARCHAR(16),
  partNumber VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  partType VARCHAR(32),
  description TEXT,
  howToObtain TEXT,
  s3Key VARCHAR(512),
  s3Url TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX idx_partNumber (partNumber),
  INDEX idx_platform (platform)
);

  notes TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX idx_platform (platform)
